name: search_by_date
description: Browse documents by modification/creation date range. Returns a chronological list of documents matching the time criteria. Use for time-based recall ('what did I work on last week', 'files from July 2024').

after.description: ISO 8601 date or datetime string — only documents modified after this point (e.g. '2024-07-01' or '2024-07-01T09:00:00Z')

before.description: ISO 8601 date or datetime string — only documents modified before this point (e.g. '2024-08-01' or '2024-08-01T00:00:00Z')

source_id.description: Filter to a specific source. Use list_sources to discover available IDs.

limit.description: Maximum number of documents to return (default 50, max 200)
